positive: A stylized, minimalistic depiction of a celestial forest at twilight. The scene features bioluminescent flora and fauna, casting a soft, vibrant glow against deep indigo and sapphire gradients. The central motif is a towering, stylized crescent moon nestled amongst glowing, abstract crystalline trees. Include gentle, flowing silhouettes of mythical deer or fox forms in the midground. The composition should be symmetrical and highly detailed, suitable for a repeating apparel pattern. Style: Neo-Art Nouveau, vector graphic quality, high contrast, crisp outlines, clean lines, deep saturated jewel tones, volumetric lighting, flat digital art aesthetic. Aspect Ratio 1:1.
negative: blur, grainy, artifacts, watermarks, text, signature, logo, watermark, noise, poor anatomy, extra limbs, mutated, low detail, bokeh, bad composition, photorealistic, graffiti
